items.caption: A stylized emblem with a dark background. the emblem is designed with a shield shape at the center, outlined in white, with a red background. inside the shield, there is a white silhouette of a person wearing a helmet and holding a weapon, suggesting a warrior or soldier. above the shield, the text "arc" is written in white capital letters, and below the shield, the words "days of war" are written in white capital letters. the emblem has a three-dimensional effect, with the shield appearing to be slightly raised from the background. the overall style of the emblem is reminiscent of a gaming clan logo, with a focus on military or combat themes.
